{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Skysworn Captain
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] had a confrontation with the [[Skysworn Captain]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c14">''Skysworn'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Skysworn Captain]] carries a [[sword]] over his shoulder.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
